footer_powered_by: © Alpha Trust AI | Powered by Alpha Trust AI
footer_alphatrust_description: Alpha Trust AI is an international online broker founded in 2008, offering forex currency pairs, commodities, indices, and shares for trading. The broker is regulated and licensed by the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) under license number 214/13.
footer_risk_warning: Risk Warning: Trading leveraged products such as Forex and CFDs carries a considerable level of risk, as such it may not be suitable for all investors. Whilst leverage enables traders to magnify their profits on successful trades, it also magnifies losses on unsuccessful trades; meaning that it is possible to sustain significant losses, perhaps even the entire sum of your invested capital. As such, we urge all clients to adopt a prudent risk management strategy in accordance with their investment goals and level of trading experience. Please ensure you read our
footer_restricted_clients: We do not accept or solicit US and Australian Citizens neither clients that possess dual citizenship from the United States or/and Australia.
watch_the_market: Don't Just Watch the Market - Grow with Alpha Trust AI!

pep_tooltip:
POLITICALLY EXPOSED PERSON

The term includes individuals who are or have been entrusted with prominent public functions:
• Heads of state, government, ministers and deputies
• Members of parliaments
• Members of supreme or constitutional courts
• Members of courts of auditors or boards of central banks
• Ambassadors and high-ranking armed-forces officers
• Senior management of state-owned enterprises

trading_warning_html:
1. Alpha Trust (the "Company") would like to warn you and bring to your attention that, based on the information provided to us, you do not seem to possess the appropriate experience and knowledge derived from the Law, to trade in leverage products such as Forex and CFD\’s which carry a high degree of risk.

2. The Company considers that by clicking the "[Accept]" button below, you confirm that the brokerage services and financial instruments the Company offers - Forex and CFDs are not appropriate for you, but you still wish to proceed and open a trading account with Alpha Trust
